reviews.text: Waited over 45 minutes for our food, and when it finally arrived, my pasta was stone cold. Server didn't seem to care when I mentioned it.
Made a reservation for 7pm, but when we arrived, they had no record of it and made us wait another 30 minutes. Completely disorganized.
The floor was sticky, and the bathroom was filthy. Not what I expected from a place in this price range.
Ordered a vegetarian dish, but it came out with chicken in it. Staff didn't apologize, just took it back and brought the same plate minus the chicken.
Our server was incredibly rude, rolling her eyes when we asked questions about the menu. Made us feel unwelcome.
Food took forever and when it arrived, my burger was raw in the middle. Sent it back and still got charged for it.
They messed up our bill, charging us for drinks we never ordered. Took 20 minutes to fix and no apology.
The table was sticky and had crumbs all over it when we were seated. No one bothered to clean it even after we asked.
Ordered a steak medium rare, but it came out well done and dry. When I complained, the manager just shrugged.
Our drinks arrived after our meal, and the soda was flat. Not worth the price at all.
Had to flag down staff multiple times just to get water refilled. Service was painfully slow.
The chicken was undercooked and pink inside. Lost my appetite and won't be coming back.
We were seated next to a loud group even though the restaurant was half empty. Staff refused to move us.
Asked for no onions due to an allergy, but my salad was covered in them. Dangerous and careless.
The server forgot half our order and we had to remind them twice. Still got charged for everything.
Restrooms were disgusting—no soap, overflowing trash, and smelled terrible.
Our appetizer arrived after our main course, and both were cold. No compensation offered.
Took forever to get the check, and when it finally came, it was for the wrong table.
Staff seemed annoyed when we asked for a high chair for our toddler. Not family-friendly at all.
The fish tasted off and made me feel sick later that night. Not taking any chances here again.
